project.name: project gabut
project.currentFocus: Phase 0 security patch and Phase 1 Supabase admin/user role foundation
durableFacts: SkillPath uses Next.js App Router, Supabase Auth/RLS, and a neobrutalism UI system.
User dashboard lives at /dashboard; admin dashboard lives at /admin and is guarded by profiles.role.
Production cron sync requires CRON_SECRET via Bearer token or x-cron-secret header.

lastAchievements: Upgraded Next.js to 15.5.18 and resolved npm audit runtime vulnerabilities with a PostCSS override.
Added Supabase SSR/browser/middleware helpers and server-side admin/user role checks.
Added additive Supabase migration 002_add_auth_roles.sql for profiles.role and admin read RLS policies.
Updated README and baseline docs for auth, API, database, flow, and design scope.
pendingIssues: Complete sign-in/sign-out UI is still a later auth phase.
Admin write actions for moderation and role management are not implemented yet.
docs/design-intent.json remains a seed scaffold for future broad UI redesign work.
nextBestActions: Apply Supabase migrations and promote the first admin through trusted SQL.
Build the auth UI and callback flow.
Add admin moderation actions with server-side validation and audit logs.
validationState: npm run lint passed with Next 16 deprecation warning for next lint
